diagrams.title: Phong Lighting Components
diagrams.description: Shows three types of light interaction: ambient (scattered), diffuse (Lambertian), specular (mirror-like)
diagrams.purpose: Understand three components of Phong model and their physical meaning

diagrams.title: Vector Relationships in Phong Model
diagrams.description: Shows geometric relationship between L, N, R, and V vectors at surface point
elements: Angle between R and V (specular angle)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize vector computations and dot products used in equations

diagrams.title: Effect of Shininess Exponent
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how shininess n affects specular highlight size
elements: Smooth surface (high n) - small sharp highlight
Rough surface (low n) - large diffuse highlight
diagrams.purpose: Understand relationship between n parameter and visual appearance

visuals.title: The Phong Lighting Model
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the phong lighting model
